title: Luffy Is Nearly Free
description: On pages 17–18, luffy is nearly free focuses on Sanji, Nojiko, Genzo, Luffy as the fight centers on freeing Luffy from underwater before Arlong’s crew can finish the Straw Hats.
scene: On pages 17–18, luffy is nearly free focuses on Sanji, Nojiko, Genzo, Luffy as the fight centers on freeing Luffy from underwater before Arlong’s crew can finish the Straw Hats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did you... just do some- thing...?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
